title: Bump bee to 0.1.20 (model-tier-guard release), sync everywhere, push
action: Set BEE_VERSION to 0.1.20 in templates/lib/state.mjs:7; set .claude-plugin/plugin.json version to 0.1.20; run onboard_bee --apply --repo-hooks to propagate (vendored helpers, .bee/onboarding.json, installed ~/.claude/skills); full verify; commit; push origin main (user-requested).

truths: bee_status reports 0.1.20 across source/host/installed with recheck up_to_date

trace.verify_output: test_lib 124 passed 0 failed; test_onboard PASS failures:0 skipped:1; hook table ALL PASS; onboarding applied recheck up_to_date, source/host/installed all 0.1.20
